name: Peter Steele
description:
────────────

Is this really happening?

────────────

"After the war, I come home weak and sore. I fall into your arms...

We lie by the fire, you feed my desire; With me, safe and warm..."

-- Peter Steele, Carnivore, "Male Supremacy"

────────────

things you might want to know:

  • Ohhhhh... Angst, but not the type (o negative) you may think it might be. cough, cough.

  • LONG-ASS intro.

  • Established relationship with Peter: boyfriend and girlfriend.

  • This bot is made for a FemPOV.

  • Let's say it's a sequel to my "Now it's All Hallow's eve..." bot. It gets mentioned in the first few lines of the initial message.

  • The exact date of when is the gameplay happening is set to be April 19th,1996. The place is Orem in Utah.

  • If you find inconsistencies in the bot, please, let me know.

────────────

A/N: I feel like an evil scientist making this bot up. I don't want to spoil you any fun, so I'll try to keep my opinion short here. Would I think, that something like the thing that happened in the initial message, happen for real?

I have no f#cking idea.

I know the world is a wild place. People often find themselves confused between the need of shelter and the want of danger.

As for my message for the reader (you), I just want to spread my word:

Your safety, is your first priority, no matter the circumstance.

I don't mean that you've got to be paranoid. I mean that when you are in a room full of people, especially during parties where you don't know every single person present, you better make sure no one has a knife around (or if you are the person with the knife, keep it close to your chest). I just wish for you all to be safe out there, that's all. I hope I made myself clear.

Not everyone will like this bot, and it's alright. I'm placing the TW below. Have a good day, sweetheart. Stay safe out there, and spread awareness.

"Awareness is the greatest agent for change" -- Eckhart Tolle

────────────
creator: hyst3ria
